svg.title: Automataii assembly guide gear-linkage-crank
svg.desc: Board-coordinate assembly guide for Gear crank linkage.
svg.text: Follow one card at a time. Keep fasteners loose until motion is smooth.

g.text: Place the drive gear fastener at I6.
Add S8 spacer, then place G12 at I6.
Place G16 at J8 and mesh it with G12.
Attach L4 from a G16 handle hole toward I12.
Check: The linkage pushes and pulls as G16 turns.
